markschemeHtml:
a. example of mutualistic species 

b. description of mutualism

Accept commonplace names for organisms in (a)

Examples:

a. oxpecker (bird) and therhinoceros/zebra 

b. oxpeckers/bird on rhinos/zebras eat parasites getting food while rhino/zebra get pest control

OR

a. hummingbird hawk-moth and Dianthus

b. (hummingbird hawk) moth gets nectar from flower while it pollinates the flower

meta.title: Outline one example of mutualism.
